Elder Slster of Father lVldowed tn Mlddle Age (IX)
The elder sister of father ls represented by the 7th

Tlne Lagna has manifold malelic inlluences on it' as

Younger Slster to Father Has No Son (f,Kl
The younger slster to father is represented by the
1lth house, her progeny by the 3rd house (5th to 1lth)'
The 3rd house contalns a maleflc Moon and is aspected

in the l2th house from the 3rd. Jupiter, no doubt'
